name: Cocoa Apple Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 Apples; cored and grated or finely chopped (2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together eggs, sugar, margarine, and water until fluffy.
2. Sift flour, cocoa, baking soda, cinnamon, and allspice into a bowl.
3. Add the sifted dry ingredients to the egg mixture and mix well.
4. Fold in nuts, chocolate, apples, and vanilla until evenly distributed.
5. Pour batter into a greased and floured 10-inch loose-bottom tube pan.
6. Bake at 325°F for 60-70 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
7. Makes 1 cake serving 10 people.
